props.name: shimmerColor
props.description: Colour of the travelling shimmer highlight.

props.name: shimmerSize
props.description: Diameter of the shimmer highlight.

props.name: shimmerDuration
props.description: Seconds for one full rotation.

props.name: radius
props.description: Corner radius.

props.name: background
props.description: Background of the button face.

props.name: as
props.description: Render as a different element for navigation semantics — e.g. an `<a>` or a router `Link`. Defaults to `"button"`. Pass `href` alongside for links.

props.name: href
props.description: Destination, used when rendering as a link element via `as`.

props.name: items
props.description: Items to scroll. Strings or nodes.

props.name: baseSpeed
props.description: Base pixels/second.

props.name: direction
props.description: Scroll direction.

props.name: scrollBoost
props.description: Extra px/sec added at peak scroll velocity.

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap between items, any CSS length.

props.name: text
props.description: The text to reveal, split per word.

props.name: stagger
props.description: Seconds between each word.

props.name: by
props.description: Split unit.

props.name: once
props.description: Only animate once.

props.name: as
props.description: Element to render as.

props.name: size
props.description: Resting icon size (px).

props.name: magnification
props.description: Peak magnified size (px).

props.name: distance
props.description: Cursor influence radius (px).

props.name: colors
props.description: Two or more colours the aurora blends between.

props.name: background
props.description: Base backdrop colour.

props.name: speed
props.description: Animation seconds for one cycle.

props.name: blur
props.description: Blur radius of the aurora bands.

props.name: grain
props.description: Show a subtle grain overlay.

props.name: cols
props.description: Grid columns.

props.name: rows
props.description: Grid rows.

props.name: dotSize
props.description: Dot diameter (px).

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap between dots (px).

props.name: color
props.description: Dot colour.

props.name: speed
props.description: Seconds for one animation cycle.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible status label.

props.name: variant
props.description: Which choreography the dots follow. Defaults to the original `"wave"`.

props.name: lineWidth
props.description: Line container size, any CSS length.

props.name: baseAngle
props.description: Base (resting) rotation in degrees.

props.name: colors
props.description: Two or three hex colours the aurora gradient sweeps through.

props.name: background
props.description: Base backdrop colour (also the GL clear colour).

props.name: speed
props.description: Flow speed multiplier. ~0.15 is a slow, hero-grade drift.

props.name: pixelSize
props.description: Dither cell size in device pixels — the size of one lattice dot.

props.name: paused
props.description: Freeze the flow (rendering idles; the last frame stays up).

props.name: grain
props.description: Add a subtle animated film-grain pass on top of the lattice.

props.name: preset
props.description: Metal look for the ring. `"chromatic"` hue-rotates iridescent reflections.

props.name: strength
props.description: Reflection intensity / turbulence, 0–1. Hover nudges it up. Default `0.6`.

props.name: paused
props.description: Freeze the shader on a single rendered frame.

props.name: ringWidth
props.description: Visual thickness of the metal ring. Default `"2.5px"`.

props.name: radius
props.description: Corner radius of the pill. Default `"9999px"`.

props.name: background
props.description: Solid colour of the inner button face (mirrors `--pb-ink`). Default `#0f0f10`.

props.name: as
props.description: Render as a different element for navigation semantics — e.g. an `<a>` or a router `Link`. Defaults to `"button"`. Pass `href` alongside for links.

props.name: href
props.description: Destination, used when rendering as a link element via `as`.

props.name: state
props.description: Controlled state. Pair with `onStateChange`.

props.name: defaultState
props.description: Initial state when uncontrolled.

props.name: onStateChange
props.description: Fires on every state change (both controlled and uncontrolled).

props.name: idleContent
props.description: Compact content shown in the `idle` pill. Falls back to a pulsing dot + `label`.

props.name: label
props.description: Label used by the default idle content when `idleContent` is not supplied.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent colour for the idle dot and the ring stroke. Defaults to Parable violet (`--pb-violet`).

props.name: background
props.description: Pill face colour. Defaults to Parable ink `#0f0f10` (`--pb-ink`).

props.name: ringProgress
props.description: Progress `0..1` for the `ring` state.

props.name: ringContent
props.description: Centre content for the `ring` state (e.g. a countdown or icon).

props.name: collapseOnOutsideClick
props.description: Collapse to `idle` when a pointer press lands outside the island while expanded.

props.name: children
props.description: Expanded panel body — title, text, actions, anything.

props.name: title
props.description: Primary heading shown in the collapsed row.

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Optional secondary line under the title.

props.name: media
props.description: Decorative media — a left thumbnail or a full-width top strip.

props.name: mediaLayout
props.description: Where `media` renders. `"thumb"` = left of the title; `"strip"` = above it.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent used for the chevron and focus ring. Mirrors the site `--pb-violet` token.

props.name: defaultExpanded
props.description: Uncontrolled initial open state.

props.name: expanded
props.description: Controlled open state. Pair with `onExpandedChange`.

props.name: onExpandedChange
props.description: Fires with the next open state when the header is toggled.

props.name: children
props.description: Expanded body content. Direct children fade/slide in with a slight stagger.

props.name: logos
props.description: The logos to cycle through, distributed round-robin across columns.

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of columns (tiles) shown in the wall.

props.name: interval
props.description: Milliseconds between swaps. One column swaps per tick, so any given column re-swaps every `interval * columns` ms.

props.name: rows
props.description: Fixed row count. Omit to derive from container height.

props.name: cols
props.description: Fixed column count. Omit to derive from container width.

props.name: color
props.description: Dot colour. Default mirrors the site's `--pb-violet` token.

props.name: dotSize
props.description: Dot radius in px.

props.name: radius
props.description: Pointer influence radius in px.

props.name: strength
props.description: Force multiplier — 1 is the tuned default, 2 pulls twice as hard.

props.name: mode
props.description: Whether the pointer pulls dots in or pushes them away.

props.name: as
props.description: Element to render. Defaults to `"h2"`. Use `h1`–`h6` for document structure, or `p` when the visual style is wanted without heading semantics.

props.name: variant
props.description: Gradient palette. Mirrors the site's `--pb-*` tokens. - `aurora` — violet → fuchsia → ember (default) - `steel` — warm vellum → chrome-ish grays - `signal` — violet → signal cyan

props.name: animate
props.description: Slowly drift the gradient (~8s loop). Ignored under reduced motion.

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset. Defaults to `"md"`.

props.name: data
props.description: Series to plot. Ships a nice 12-point default when omitted.

props.name: title
props.description: Heading shown top-left of the card.

props.name: color
props.description: Line + fill colour. Defaults to Parable violet `#8b5cf6` (mirrors the site's `--pb-violet` token).

props.name: height
props.description: Plot area height in pixels (excludes the header row).

props.name: valueFormatter
props.description: Formats headline, tooltip and aria values. Defaults to compact USD.

props.name: title
props.description: Heading shown in the block header.

props.name: transactions
props.description: Rows to render. Defaults to a realistic 7-row sample set.

props.name: currency
props.description: Fallback ISO 4217 code when a row omits its own.

props.name: onRowClick
props.description: Called with the transaction when a row is activated (makes rows buttons).

props.name: variant
props.description: Which mockup to render around the children.

props.name: url
props.description: Address-bar text for the `"browser"` variant.

props.name: tab
props.description: Optional tab label for the `"browser"` variant. When provided, a tab strip is rendered above the toolbar; omit it for a chromeless single-row window.

props.name: shadow
props.description: Layered, realistic drop shadow under the frame.

props.name: children
props.description: Screen content — clipped to the device's screen area.

props.name: onSubmit
props.description: Runs when a valid email is submitted. Resolve to show the success state, throw/reject to fall back to the form with an error hint. Defaults to a fake ~1.2s delay so the slice demos itself.

props.name: title
props.description: Card heading.

props.name: subtitle
props.default: "We'll email you a magic link. No password needed."
props.description: One-liner under the heading.

props.name: logo
props.description: Logo slot above the heading. Defaults to a small violet gradient tile.

props.name: finePrint
props.default: "By continuing you agree to the Terms · Privacy"
props.description: Mono fine-print line at the foot of the card.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent hex — button, floated label, success check. Default Parable violet.

props.name: onOAuth
props.description: Called when an OAuth-style button is pressed (demo-grade, no real auth).

props.name: items
props.description: Ordered cards. Each sticks in turn while the next scrolls over it.

props.name: cardClassName
props.description: Extra classes merged onto every card face.

props.name: stickyTop
props.description: Distance in px from the viewport top where each card pins. Defaults to 96.

props.name: text
props.description: The string to display. On change, the board animates to the new value.

props.name: charSet
props.description: Ordered character set the flaps cycle through. Order defines the flip path. Defaults to space + A–Z + 0–9 + basic punctuation.

props.name: speed
props.description: Milliseconds per single flap (one character advance).

props.name: loop
props.description: `false` to run once; a number = ms to pause after settling, then re-run.

props.name: stagger
props.description: Extra ms of start delay between adjacent cells (left-to-right settle).

props.name: cellClassName
props.description: Class applied to each flap cell.

props.name: cellColor
props.description: Cell (flap) background. Defaults to Parable ink `--pb-ink`.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Glyph colour. Defaults to a warm near-white.

props.name: count
props.description: How many eyes to render.

props.name: size
props.description: Eye height in px (width is derived from it).

props.name: eyeColor
props.description: Sclera / eyeball fill.

props.name: pupilColor
props.description: Pupil fill.

props.name: irisColor
props.description: Iris ring around the pupil. Defaults to the Parable violet.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label. When set, the whole graphic is exposed as `role="img"` with this label; otherwise it stays `aria-hidden` (decorative).

props.name: title
props.description: Primary heading shown on the resting front face.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional short eyebrow shown above the title.

props.name: detail
props.description: The layer revealed beneath the front face — body copy plus a CTA.

props.name: href
props.description: When set, the whole card renders as an `<a>` link to this href.

props.name: target
props.description: Anchor target, applied only when `href` is set.

props.name: rel
props.description: Anchor rel, applied only when `href` is set.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent for the pointer glow, baseline bar, arrow, and focus ring.

props.name: items
props.description: The pile, newest first. Fully controlled — render whatever you keep in state.

props.name: onDismiss
props.description: Fires with the dismissed `id` (tap the ✕, or swipe the card sideways).

props.name: collapsedCount
props.description: How many cards peek in the collapsed stack before the rest are hidden.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent for the icon tint, count pill, and focus ring. Mirrors `--pb-violet`.

props.name: cellSize
props.description: Edge length of one grid cell, in pixels.

props.name: lineColor
props.description: Hex colour of the resting grid lines (drawn faintly).

props.name: glowColor
props.description: Hex colour of the pointer spotlight and ambient cells. Mirrors `--pb-violet`.

props.name: radius
props.description: Radius of the pointer spotlight, in pixels.

props.name: pulse
props.description: Slowly pulse a scattered, deterministic set of cells.

props.name: pulseCount
props.description: How many ambient cells pulse when `pulse` is on.

props.name: children
props.description: Foreground content, rendered above the grid via a `z-10` wrapper.

props.name: text
props.description: The string that resolves out of the glyph noise.

props.name: trigger
props.description: When the decode fires. `"view"` plays once on scroll-in, `"mount"` plays once after hydration, `"hover"` replays on each pointer-enter / focus.

props.name: speed
props.description: Speed multiplier — 2 runs twice as fast, 0.5 half.

props.name: scrambleChars
props.description: Characters the scramble draws from.

props.name: color
props.description: Tint for characters still scrambling; they settle to the inherited color. Mirrors `--pb-cyan`.

props.name: as
props.description: Element to render as. Defaults to `span`.

props.name: children
props.description: The text (or inline nodes) to highlight.

props.name: variant
props.description: Highlight style: a marker band, a drawn underline, or a framed box.

props.name: color
props.description: Highlight colour. Hex values get sensible low-alpha treatment per variant.

props.name: duration
props.description: Sweep duration in seconds.

props.name: delay
props.description: Delay before the sweep starts, in seconds.

props.name: amount
props.description: Fraction of the element that must be visible before the sweep fires.

props.name: once
props.description: Animate only the first time it enters the viewport.

props.name: label
props.description: Text of the floating `<label>` (wired to the input via `htmlFor`/`id`).

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value. Pair with `onChange`.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial value.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Native change handler; fires on every keystroke in both modes.

props.name: error
props.description: When set, the field enters its error state: red hint + shake + `aria-invalid`.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional decorative leading icon (rendered `aria-hidden`, tints with state).

props.name: success
props.description: Show the drawn success tick on the right (ignored while `error` is set).

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent for the drawn underline, caret, focus ring, and focused label. Mirrors `--pb-violet`.

props.name: errorColor
props.description: Error tone for the hint, underline, and label. Mirrors `--pb-fuchsia`.

props.name: successColor
props.description: Success tone for the tick. Mirrors `--pb-cyan`.

props.name: ink
props.description: Backdrop the focus ring offsets against. Mirrors `--pb-ink`.

props.name: tiers
props.description: The plans to render, left to right.

props.name: defaultCycle
props.description: Which cycle is active on first paint.

props.name: currency
props.description: Currency symbol prefixed to every price.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent for the popular tier, switch, and check icons. Mirrors `--pb-violet`.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Fires with a tier's `name` when its CTA is pressed.

props.name: src
props.description: Image source URL.

props.name: alt
props.description: Alt text. Required — pass "" only for decorative imagery.

props.name: aspect
props.description: CSS aspect-ratio for the frame, e.g. "16/9" or "4/5". Prevents layout shift.

props.name: direction
props.description: Which way the curtain wipe travels as it uncovers the image.

props.name: rounded
props.description: Border radius for the frame, as any CSS length (e.g. "1rem", "9999px").

props.name: amount
props.description: Fraction of the frame that must be visible before revealing (0–1).

props.name: once
props.description: Reveal only the first time it scrolls into view.

props.name: duration
props.description: Reveal duration in seconds.

props.name: loading
props.description: `loading` hint forwarded to the underlying .

props.name: images
props.description: Image URLs cycled through as the trail spawns. Required, non-empty.

props.name: maxVisible
props.description: Maximum images alive at once; the oldest gracefully retires past it.

props.name: spawnDistance
props.description: Pointer travel, in px, between spawns. Larger = sparser trail.

props.name: items
props.description: The cards / media to lay out horizontally. Each becomes a focusable list item.

props.name: gap
props.description: Space between items, in pixels.

props.name: snap
props.description: Snap the nearest item to centre when a drag / flick / wheel settles.

props.name: accent
props.description: Focus-ring colour. Mirrors the site's `--pb-violet` token.

props.name: scaleAmount
props.description: How much edge items shrink (0 = flat, 0.16 ≈ 84% at the far edge).

props.name: rotateAmount
props.description: Peak tilt in degrees applied to items as they pass the centre.

props.name: content
props.description: Rich tooltip body — any node, not just a string.

props.name: children
props.description: The single element that opens the tooltip on hover / focus.

props.name: side
props.description: Preferred side; auto-flips to the opposite side on overflow.

props.name: delay
props.description: Open delay in ms after hover / focus begins.

props.name: closeDelay
props.description: Close delay in ms — the grace window to cross into the tooltip.

props.name: offset
props.description: Distance in px between the trigger and the tooltip box.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Max tooltip width in px.

props.name: background
props.description: Surface colour. Mirrors the site `--pb-ink` token.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent for the hairline edge glow. Mirrors the site `--pb-violet` token.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes on the tooltip surface.

props.name: tokens
props.description: Tokens offered on both sides. Needs at least two distinct symbols.

props.name: defaultFrom
props.description: Symbol pre-selected in the "You pay" field. Defaults to `tokens[0]`.

props.name: defaultTo
props.description: Symbol pre-selected in the "You receive" field. Defaults to `tokens[1]`.

props.name: defaultAmount
props.description: Amount pre-filled in the "You pay" field. Defaults to `"1"`.

props.name: onSwap
props.description: Runs when "Swap" is pressed. Resolve to reach the done state, throw to fall back to idle. Defaults to a fake ~1.1s settle so the card demos itself.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent hex — button, focus ring, active option. Default Parable violet.

props.name: members
props.description: The people to list. Each becomes one focusable row.

props.name: accent
props.description: Primary accent (bar, role text, arrow, focus ring). Mirrors `--pb-violet`.

props.name: accentTo
props.description: Secondary accent the drawing bar fades toward. Mirrors `--pb-fuchsia`.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Fires with the picked member and its index on click / activation.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state. Pair with `onOpenChange`.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Uncontrolled initial open state.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Fires with the next open state on trigger, backdrop, Escape, or drag-dismiss.

props.name: triggerLabel
props.description: Renders a built-in trigger button with this label. Omit to open via `open`.

props.name: children
props.description: Drawer body. Swap it to move between steps — the height springs to the new content. Change `contentKey` alongside it to cross-fade the swap.

props.name: contentKey
props.description: Identity of the current step. When it changes, the outgoing content cross-fades out as the incoming content fades in and the height morphs. Leave undefined to update children in place (height still morphs).

props.name: title
props.description: Accessible + visible heading. When set, labels the dialog via `aria-labelledby`.

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary line under the title; describes the dialog via `aria-describedby`.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent hex — trigger, grabber, focus ring. Mirrors the site `--pb-violet` token.

props.name: background
props.description: Panel face colour. Mirrors the site `--pb-ink` token.

props.name: dismissThreshold
props.description: Downward drag distance (px) past which release dismisses the drawer.

props.name: value
props.description: Progress amount; clamped to 0–100.

props.name: size
props.description: Outer diameter in px.

props.name: thickness
props.description: Stroke width in px. Defaults to ~`size / 12`.

props.name: colors
props.description: Two hex stops for the gradient stroke (start → end).

props.name: trackColor
props.description: Colour of the unfilled track ring behind the progress arc.

props.name: showValue
props.description: Render the rounded percentage in the centre when no `children` are given.

props.name: children
props.description: Custom centred label (node); overrides the percentage when present.

props.name: label
props.description: Small uppercase caption above the value (e.g. "Monthly revenue").

props.name: value
props.description: Target number. Counts up from 0 the first time the card scrolls into view.

props.name: delta
props.description: Signed percentage change; renders a coloured chip with an up/down arrow.

props.name: data
props.description: Optional micro-series drawn as a tiny inline sparkline.

props.name: prefix
props.description: Text placed immediately before the value (e.g. "$").

props.name: suffix
props.description: Text placed immediately after the value (e.g. "k", "%").

props.name: icon
props.description: Leading icon node, shown top-right. Decorative — hidden from a11y.

props.name: formatter
props.description: Formats the (animating) number. Defaults to grouped, precision-matched digits.

props.name: value
props.description: The number to display. Changes animate — up or down — to the new value.

props.name: duration
props.description: Roll duration in milliseconds.

props.name: format
props.description: Format the number into its display string. Defaults to `en-US` grouping.

props.name: startOnView
props.description: Start the first roll only once the counter scrolls into view (via `IntersectionObserver`). When `false`, it rolls on mount.

props.name: max
props.description: How many avatars to show before collapsing into a "+N" chip.

props.name: size
props.description: Avatar diameter in px.

props.name: variant
props.description: Surface treatment. `"accent"` = violet gradient face (default), `"surface"` = ink face with a hairline border, `"glass"` = translucent face with a backdrop blur.

props.name: as
props.description: Render as a different element for navigation semantics — e.g. an `<a>` or a router `Link`. Defaults to `"button"`. Pass `href` alongside for links.

props.name: href
props.description: Destination, used when rendering as a link element via `as`.

props.name: children
props.description: Content that sits on the card face, inside the traced border.

props.name: size
props.description: Beam length in px — the size of the travelling comet head.

props.name: duration
props.description: Seconds for one full lap around the perimeter.

props.name: delay
props.description: Delay in seconds before the beam starts — stagger multiple beams.

props.name: colorFrom
props.description: Head colour of the comet and one end of the static ring. Mirrors `--pb-violet`.

props.name: colorTo
props.description: Tail colour of the comet and the other end of the static ring. Mirrors `--pb-fuchsia`.

props.name: borderWidth
props.description: Border thickness in px — how wide the traced ring is.

props.name: radius
props.description: Corner radius as any CSS length (e.g. `"16px"`, `"1rem"`).

props.name: reverse
props.description: Send the comet the other way around the border.

props.name: steps
props.description: Ordered steps the tour walks through.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state. Pair with `onOpenChange`.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Uncontrolled initial open state.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Fires with the next open state on Skip, Escape, backdrop, or completion.

props.name: step
props.description: Controlled active step index. Pair with `onStepChange`.

props.name: defaultStep
props.description: Uncontrolled initial step index.

props.name: onStepChange
props.description: Fires with the next step index on Back / Next / dot navigation.

props.name: onComplete
props.description: Fires when the primary button is pressed on the final step.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent hex — primary button, active dot, focus ring. Mirrors `--pb-violet`.

props.name: background
props.description: Card surface colour. Mirrors the site `--pb-ink` token.

props.name: nextLabel
props.description: Label for the advance button on non-final steps.

props.name: backLabel
props.description: Label for the back button.

props.name: skipLabel
props.description: Label for the dismiss button.

props.name: doneLabel
props.description: Label for the primary button on the final step.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes on the dialog card.

props.name: tweets
props.description: Demo/testimonial data. No live API — the wall renders what you pass.

props.name: columns
props.description: Maximum columns (default 3). Fewer are used as the container narrows.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder shown while the composer is empty.

props.name: suggestions
props.description: Optional prompt chips shown above the input while it is empty; clicking one fills the field.

props.name: onSubmit
props.description: Called with the trimmed text on submit. If it returns a promise, the spinner holds until it settles.

props.name: model
props.description: Label shown on the leading model pill (decorative in this demo composer).

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes on the outer `<form>`.

props.name: items
props.description: Slides to display. Each is centred in turn with its neighbours peeking.

props.name: loop
props.description: Wrap navigation at the ends — next from the last slide returns to the first.

props.name: onIndexChange
props.description: Fires with the new active index whenever it changes.

props.name: peek
props.description: How many px of each neighbouring slide peeks past the edge.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent for arrows, the active dot, and focus rings. Mirrors `--pb-violet`.

props.name: layers
props.description: Extra mid-ground planes rendered behind the copy. Each `content` translates by `depth × intensity`. Omit to use just the built-in backdrop + accents.

props.name: background
props.description: Backdrop node (e.g. an image). Falls back to a soft brand gradient.

props.name: intensity
props.description: Max shift in px for a depth-1 plane at the pointer extremes.

props.name: rows
props.description: Grid rows.

props.name: cols
props.description: Grid columns.

props.name: color
props.description: Glyph colour. Mirrors the site `--pb-violet` token.

props.name: speed
props.description: Flow speed multiplier.

props.name: pointerReactive
props.description: Let the pointer push a bright ripple into the field.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name. When set, the field is exposed as an image with this label; otherwise it is decorative (`aria-hidden`).

props.name: brand
props.description: Brand mark shown at the leading edge — a logo node or text.

props.name: items
props.description: Top-level items. Items with a `panel` open a mega-menu; others are links.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent for the gliding pill, focus rings and hover glow. Mirrors `--pb-violet`.

props.name: background
props.description: Bar surface colour, rendered translucent over a blur. Mirrors `--pb-ink`.

props.name: text
props.description: The copy to reveal. Takes precedence over `children`.

props.name: children
props.description: Alternative to `text` — pass the sentence as children instead.

props.name: as
props.description: Element/component to render as. Defaults to `p`.

props.name: dimColor
props.description: Colour of the not-yet-read (dim) layer. Defaults to muted foreground.

props.name: litColor
props.description: Colour of the illuminated (lit) layer. Defaults to the foreground.

props.name: stagger
props.description: Overlap between consecutive words' fade windows. `0` = crisp, strictly sequential; higher softens the sweep so several words light at once.

props.name: offset
props.description: `useScroll` offset band controlling where in the viewport the reveal runs (e.g. `["start 0.85", "end 0.5"]`). Two edge strings, entry then exit.

props.name: groups
props.description: Grouped, filterable commands. Empty groups are hidden automatically.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state. Pair with `onOpenChange`.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Fires with the next open state whenever the palette opens or closes.

props.name: hotkey
props.description: Bind the global ⌘K / Ctrl+K toggle (skipped while typing elsewhere).

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Search field placeholder.

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Shown when nothing matches the query.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent for the active row, focus ring and sheen. Mirrors `--pb-violet`.

props.name: background
props.description: Surface colour. Mirrors `--pb-ink`.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes on the dialog surface.

props.name: events
props.description: Ordered events, newest first — the first row gets the live pulse.

props.name: title
props.description: Optional heading rendered above the feed and used as its accessible label.

props.name: accept
props.description: Native `accept` filter, e.g. `"image/*,application/pdf"`.

props.name: multiple
props.description: Allow selecting/dropping more than one file (chips accumulate).

props.name: onFiles
props.description: Fired with the files accepted by the last drop/browse (post size check).

props.name: maxSizeMB
props.description: Reject (and shake) any file larger than this many megabytes.

props.name: colors
props.description: Colours the blobs cycle through. Defaults to violet / fuchsia / ember.

props.name: background
props.description: Backdrop colour behind the blobs. Mirrors the site `--pb-ink` token.

props.name: count
props.description: How many blobs to render (clamped 1–12).

props.name: speed
props.description: Drift-speed multiplier. `1` is a slow, hero-grade flow; `0` freezes it.

props.name: eyebrow
props.description: Small mono uppercase kicker above the headline.

props.name: title
props.description: The headline. Pass a string to let `accentWord` gradient-wrap one word.

props.name: accentWord
props.description: Substring of a string `title` to paint with the accent gradient.

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Supporting paragraph under the headline.

props.name: primaryLabel
props.description: Primary CTA text. Omit to hide the button.

props.name: onPrimary
props.description: Fires when the primary CTA is pressed.

props.name: primaryHref
props.description: Renders the primary CTA as a real `<a>` pointing here.

props.name: secondaryLabel
props.description: Secondary CTA text. Omit to hide the button.

props.name: onSecondary
props.description: Fires when the secondary CTA is pressed.

props.name: secondaryHref
props.description: Renders the secondary CTA as a real `<a>` pointing here.

props.name: stats
props.description: Mono proof-point row under everything, e.g. 12k stars · 400+ teams.

props.name: accent
props.description: Gradient/glow start colour and CTA fill. Mirrors `--pb-violet`.

props.name: accentAlt
props.description: Gradient/glow end colour. Mirrors `--pb-fuchsia`.

props.name: children
props.description: Extra content rendered below the actions (e.g. a screenshot or badge).

props.name: items
props.description: The feature cells, in reading order.

props.name: columns
props.description: Column count on wide screens (clamped 1–6). Narrow screens step down.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent for the icon tint, pulse halo, and hover glow. Mirrors `--pb-violet`.

props.name: testimonials
props.description: The testimonials, distributed round-robin across the rows.

props.name: rows
props.description: How many scrolling rows to render (clamped to the testimonial count).

props.name: speed
props.description: Seconds one full loop takes. Lower is faster.

props.name: title
props.description: Headline. Pair with `accentWord` to gradient-highlight one word.

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Optional supporting line under the title.

props.name: primaryLabel
props.description: Primary button label.

props.name: onPrimary
props.description: Click handler for the primary button.

props.name: primaryHref
props.description: If set, the primary CTA renders as a real `<a href>` instead of a button.

props.name: secondaryLabel
props.description: Optional secondary button label. Omit to render only the primary CTA.

props.name: onSecondary
props.description: Click handler for the secondary button.

props.name: secondaryHref
props.description: If set, the secondary CTA renders as a real `<a href>` instead of a button.

props.name: align
props.description: Content alignment within the panel.

props.name: accentWord
props.description: A word inside `title` to render with the brand gradient.

props.name: items
props.description: The question/answer pairs, rendered top to bottom.

props.name: title
props.description: Optional section heading rendered as an `<h2>` above the list.

props.name: type
props.description: `"single"` (default) keeps at most one row open — opening one closes the rest. `"multiple"` lets any number stay open at once.

props.name: defaultOpenIndex
props.description: Index of the row open on first paint. Out-of-range values open nothing.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent for the toggle icon and focus ring. Mirrors the site `--pb-violet` token.

props.name: stats
props.description: The statistics to display, left to right. Typically 3–5 entries.

props.name: sections
props.description: Ordered sections to track. One dot is rendered per entry, in order.

props.name: position
props.description: Which screen edge the rail pins to. Defaults to `"right"`.

props.name: offset
props.description: Pixels from the viewport top treated as the fold — subtracted from scroll targets and from the observer's top margin so a fixed header never hides the section a click lands on. Defaults to `0`.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent for the active dot, pill ring, and focus ring. Mirrors `--pb-violet`.

props.name: children
props.description: Content clipped to the squircle.

props.name: size
props.description: Square side length. A number is treated as pixels; a string (e.g. `"100%"`, `"12rem"`) is used verbatim on both axes. On a non-square box the mask stretches to fit. Defaults to `128`.

props.name: smoothing
props.description: Superellipse exponent: `2` = ellipse, `4` = Apple squircle, `5`+ squarer.

props.name: border
props.description: Optional outline that traces the squircle edge (constant screen-px width).

props.name: as
props.description: Element/component to render as the root. Defaults to `"div"`.

props.name: options
props.description: Segments to choose between. Rendered as equal-width columns.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled active value. Pair with `onValueChange`.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial value. Defaults to the first option.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires with the next value when the selection changes.

props.name: color
props.description: Indicator + focus-ring colour. Mirrors the site `--pb-violet` token.

props.name: size
props.description: Visual density.

props.name: cards
props.description: Cards, front-to-back. Three to five read best; any length is handled.

props.name: onFrontChange
props.description: Fires with the new front card's `id` after each cycle.

props.name: theme
props.description: Controlled theme. Pair with `onThemeChange`; the parent owns the DOM.

props.name: defaultTheme
props.description: Uncontrolled initial theme. Defaults to `"light"`.

props.name: onThemeChange
props.description: Fires with the next theme whenever the button is toggled.

props.name: size
props.description: Icon edge length in px. Defaults to 20.

props.name: sunColor
props.description: Sun disc + ray colour. Mirrors the site `--pb-ember` token (#f5a623).

props.name: moonColor
props.description: Moon disc + star colour. Mirrors the site `--pb-signal` token (#22d3ee).

props.name: ringColor
props.description: Focus-ring + hover colour. Mirrors the site `--pb-violet` token (#8b5cf6).

props.name: syncDocumentClass
props.description: When uncontrolled, toggle the `dark` class on `document.documentElement` and, on mount, sync the initial state from it. Set `false` for a purely visual toggle with no global side effects. Defaults to `true`.

props.name: glowColor
props.description: Colour of the spotlight and edge glow. Mirrors the site `--pb-violet` token.

props.name: radius
props.description: Diameter of the light pool, in px. Larger = softer, wider wash.

props.name: children
props.description: Card contents. Rendered above every decorative layer.

props.name: before
props.description: Left / top-of-stack panel, revealed by the divider. Image descriptor or node.

props.name: after
props.description: Right / base panel that fills the frame. Image descriptor or node.

props.name: defaultPosition
props.description: Uncontrolled starting divider position, 0–100. Defaults to `50`.

props.name: position
props.description: Controlled divider position, 0–100. Pair with `onPositionChange`.

props.name: onPositionChange
props.description: Fires with the next clamped position whenever the divider moves.

props.name: labels
props.description: Corner captions for each panel.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent for the focus ring and idle hint. Mirrors the site `--pb-violet` token.

props.name: tabs
props.description: Tabs to render, in visual order.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled selected value. Pair with `onValueChange`.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial value. Defaults to the first tab.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires with the next value whenever the selection changes.

props.name: variant
props.description: Indicator style: a gliding `pill` behind the label, or an `underline` bar.

props.name: children
props.description: Centerpiece — e.g. a logo — rendered above the rings, dead center.

props.name: rings
props.description: 1–3 concentric rings, each carrying evenly-spaced revolving icon chips.

props.name: pauseOnHover
props.description: Freeze all rotation while the pointer is over (or focus is within).

props.name: count
props.description: Balloons released per burst (clamped 1–80). Defaults to 18.

props.name: colors
props.description: Colours the balloons cycle through. Defaults to violet / fuchsia / ember / signal.

props.name: duration
props.description: Base rise duration in milliseconds (per-balloon jitter is applied). Defaults to 3200.

props.name: origin
props.description: Where balloons launch from. Defaults to `"bottom"`.

props.name: position
props.description: Overlay positioning. `"fixed"` (default) floats over the whole viewport; `"absolute"` fills the nearest positioned ancestor (use inside a `relative` box, e.g. a card or a preview stage).

props.name: trigger
props.description: Controlled trigger: a burst fires whenever this number changes.

props.name: interval
props.description: Auto-fire a burst every `interval` ms (ambient / demo use). Under `prefers-reduced-motion` it fires exactly once and does not repeat.

props.name: color
props.description: Glyph colour for the falling trail. Head cells stay near-white and glow in this colour. Defaults to Parable signal cyan `#22d3ee` (mirrors the site's `--pb-signal` token). Any CSS colour string works.

props.name: glyphs
props.description: Character pool the columns draw from. Defaults to katakana + digits.

props.name: fontSize
props.description: Cell size in CSS pixels — sets both the font size and column pitch.

props.name: speed
props.description: Fall-speed multiplier. `1` is a lively rain; `0` freezes mid-fall.

props.name: fade
props.description: Trail fade factor. Higher fades trails shorter (roughly `1 / fade` cells), lower leaves long comet tails. Defaults to `0.08`.

props.name: colors
props.description: Colours the pixels are seeded from. Defaults to the brand set violet `#8b5cf6` / fuchsia `#ec4899` / ember `#f5a623` / signal `#22d3ee` (mirrors the site's `--pb-*` tokens).

props.name: gap
props.description: Space between pixels in CSS px.

props.name: pixelSize
props.description: Edge length of each lit pixel in CSS px.

props.name: speed
props.description: Ripple/ease-speed multiplier. `1` is the default cadence; `0.1`–`8`.

props.name: cards
props.description: Cards to stack, front-most first. Each is placed inside the deck surface.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Fires with the new front-card index whenever the deck advances or rewinds.

props.name: loop
props.description: Wrap at the ends — dismissing the last card returns to the first. Default true.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent for the swipe hint, focus rings, and the active control. Defaults to Parable violet `#8b5cf6` (mirrors the site's `--pb-violet` token).

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name for the carousel region.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Trigger face. Defaults to a `+` glyph that rotates into an `×` when open.

props.name: actions
props.description: Toolbar items, revealed in order. Item 0 sits nearest the trigger.

props.name: expandDirection
props.description: Which way the toolbar unfurls from the trigger. Defaults to `up`.

props.name: accent
props.description: Trigger fill + focus ring. Mirrors the site `--pb-violet` token.

props.name: background
props.description: Toolbar surface colour. Mirrors the site `--pb-ink` token.

props.name: compact
props.description: The collapsed "chip" content. Clicking it expands the surface.

props.name: expandedContent
props.description: The rich "panel" content shown when expanded.

props.name: expanded
props.description: Controlled open state. Omit to let the component manage its own.

props.name: defaultExpanded
props.description: Initial open state when uncontrolled. Defaults to `false`.

props.name: onExpandedChange
props.description: Fires whenever the open state should change (both modes).

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent for the focus ring and the expanded-panel sheen. Defaults to Parable violet `#8b5cf6` (mirrors the site's `--pb-violet` token).

props.name: panelLabel
props.description: Accessible name for the expanded panel group. Defaults to "Details".

props.name: closeLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the collapse control. Defaults to "Collapse".

props.name: initialMessages
props.description: Seed transcript. Defaults to a short populated conversation.

props.name: onSend
props.description: Resolve a reply for the user's text. May be sync or async; the returned string is streamed into an assistant bubble. Defaults to a canned echo so the block feels alive with no backend.

props.name: title
props.description: Heading shown in the header.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Composer placeholder.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes on the outer card.

props.name: steps
props.description: Ordered steps the wizard walks through; the last one is the submit step.

props.name: onComplete
props.description: Fires when the final step passes validation and the form is submitted.

props.name: currentIndex
props.description: Controlled active-step index. Pair with `onIndexChange`.

props.name: defaultIndex
props.description: Uncontrolled initial active-step index.

props.name: onIndexChange
props.description: Fires with the next index on Back / Next / step-marker navigation.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent hex — progress fill, active marker, focus ring. Mirrors `--pb-violet`.

props.name: background
props.description: Card surface colour. Mirrors the site `--pb-ink` token.

props.name: backLabel
props.description: Label for the back button.

props.name: nextLabel
props.description: Label for the advance button on non-final steps.

props.name: submitLabel
props.description: Label for the advance button on the final step.

props.name: data
props.description: Bars to plot. Ships an 8-point default when omitted.

props.name: secondaryData
props.description: Optional second series drawn as a slimmer overlay bar centred in each slot. Matched to `data` by index; extra or missing points are ignored.

props.name: title
props.description: Heading shown top-left of the card.

props.name: color
props.description: Primary bar colour. Defaults to Parable violet `#8b5cf6` (mirrors the site's `--pb-violet` token).

props.name: secondaryColor
props.description: Overlay bar colour. Defaults to Parable signal cyan `#22d3ee` (mirrors the site's `--pb-signal` token). Only used when `secondaryData` is set.

props.name: seriesLabel
props.description: Legend name for the primary series.

props.name: secondaryLabel
props.description: Legend name for the overlay series.

props.name: height
props.description: Plot area height in pixels (excludes the header row).

props.name: valueFormatter
props.description: Formats headline total, tooltip, tick and aria values. Defaults to compact.

props.name: data
props.description: Slices to plot. Zero / negative values are dropped.

props.name: size
props.description: Outer diameter of the ring in pixels. Defaults to 200.

props.name: thickness
props.description: Ring stroke width in pixels (clamped to fit `size`). Defaults to 26.

props.name: centerLabel
props.description: Center content. Defaults to the formatted total with a "Total" caption.

props.name: valueFormatter
props.description: Formats legend values, the center total and aria text. Defaults to grouped integers.

props.name: data
props.description: Per-day activity. Days absent from the list render as level 0 (empty).

props.name: weeks
props.description: Number of week columns to show (clamped 1–53). Defaults to 26.

props.name: colorScale
props.description: Exactly 5 colors, empty → most-active. Falls back to the violet ramp.

props.name: endDate
props.description: Last day of the grid, `YYYY-MM-DD`. Fixed constant by default so the grid is deterministic across SSR — pass your own "today" to make it live.

props.name: startWeekday
props.description: Top-row weekday, Sunday = 0 … Saturday = 6. Defaults to Sunday.

props.name: title
props.description: Heading shown top-left of the card.

props.name: columns
props.description: Columns and their cards. Ships a small default board when omitted.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Fired with the next board after any move (drag drop or keyboard).

props.name: src
props.description: Image source. Used for both the inline frame and the lightbox.

props.name: alt
props.description: Alt text (required). Also names the lightbox dialog for assistive tech.

props.name: zoom
props.description: Inner-zoom magnification while hovering/pressing the frame. Default `2`.

props.name: lightbox
props.description: Whether clicking the frame opens the full-screen lightbox. Default `true`.

props.name: width
props.description: Intrinsic pixel width — set with `height` to reserve space (no CLS).

props.name: height
props.description: Intrinsic pixel height — set with `width` to reserve space (no CLS).

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes on the frame element.

props.name: steps
props.description: Ordered steps to render.

props.name: current
props.description: Index of the active step. Steps before it read as complete, this one as current, later ones as upcoming. Pass `steps.length` to mark all complete.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout axis. Defaults to `"horizontal"`.

props.name: onStepClick
props.description: When provided, completed and current steps become keyboard-operable buttons that fire with their index; upcoming steps stay inert.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent used for fills, checks and the current ring. Defaults to Parable violet `#8b5cf6` (mirrors the site `--pb-violet` token).

props.name: variant
props.description: Which placeholder shape to render. Defaults to `"rect"`.

props.name: width
props.description: Block width. Number → px, string passes through (e.g. `"60%"`).

props.name: height
props.description: Block height. Number → px, string passes through.

props.name: radius
props.description: Corner radius. Number → px, string passes through.

props.name: lines
props.description: For `variant="text"`: how many lines to render (clamped 1–16).

props.name: label
props.description: When set, the placeholder becomes an accessible busy region (`role="status" aria-busy`) announcing this label to assistive tech. Omitted, the whole placeholder is `aria-hidden` — purely decorative.

props.name: peaks
props.description: Explicit peak amplitudes (0–1). When provided, wins over `seed`.

props.name: seed
props.description: Seed for the procedural waveform. Deterministic across SSR and client.

props.name: duration
props.description: Total duration in seconds.

props.name: currentTime
props.description: Controlled playhead position in seconds. When set, the internal transport stops self-advancing — drive time from the parent and listen to `onSeek`.

props.name: defaultTime
props.description: Initial playhead position (uncontrolled), in seconds.

props.name: playing
props.description: Controlled playing state. Pair with `onPlayPause`.

props.name: defaultPlaying
props.description: Initial playing state (uncontrolled).

props.name: onSeek
props.description: Fires with the target time (seconds) on every user seek: click, drag, or keyboard.

props.name: onPlayPause
props.description: Fires with the requested state when the user toggles play/pause, and with `false` when playback reaches the end.

props.name: accentColor
props.description: Played-region / playhead colour. Any CSS colour, `var()` welcome.

props.name: inactiveColor
props.description: Unplayed-region colour. Any CSS colour, `var()` welcome.

props.name: height
props.description: Waveform height in px.

props.name: barWidth
props.description: Width of each waveform bar in px.

props.name: barGap
props.description: Gap between bars in px.

props.name: hideControls
props.description: Hide the play button + time readout row.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label for the scrub surface.

props.name: tint
props.description: Caustic light colour. Any CSS colour, including `var(--token)` — CSS variables are resolved against this element's cascade on the client.

props.name: background
props.description: Deep-water base colour (also painted behind the canvas, so there is no flash before the first GL frame). Accepts `var(--token)` like `tint`.

props.name: intensity
props.description: Glow strength multiplier. ~0.5 is faint shimmer, 2 is full sunbeams.

props.name: speed
props.description: Flow-speed multiplier. 1 is the slow, hero-grade drift.

props.name: paused
props.description: Idle the render loop (the last frame stays up).

props.name: dials
props.description: The dials, in left-to-right order. Each dial declares its ordered faces. The number of dials is `dials.length`.

props.name: combination
props.description: Winning face indices, one per dial (same length/order as `dials`). When every dial's value equals this, the lock unlocks.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled face indices, one per dial. Provide with `onChange`.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial face indices. Defaults to all zeros.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called whenever any dial changes (controlled or uncontrolled).

props.name: onUnlock
props.description: Fired once when the combination is first matched.

props.name: children
props.description: Revealed content once unlocked. A function receives `{ solved }` so callers can render before/after states; a node is shown only after unlock.

props.name: hint
props.description: Compact hint shown under the dials (e.g. "Drag or use ↑ ↓").

props.name: dialSize
props.description: Diameter of each dial in px. Default 88.

props.name: accentColor
props.description: Accent colour (pointer, solved glow, focus ring).

props.name: faceColor
props.description: Face glyph colour.

props.name: mutedColor
props.description: Muted colour for tick marks and labels.

props.name: trackColor
props.description: Dial track/plate stroke colour.

props.name: showShackle
props.description: Show the decorative padlock shackle above the dials. Default true.

props.name: fontFamily
props.description: CSS `font-family` the specimen renders in. Loading the font is the consumer's job (`next/font`, `@font-face`, or a Google Fonts link).

props.name: axes
props.description: Variable axes exposed as sliders. Defaults to Fraunces' opsz/wght/SOFT/WONK.

props.name: text
props.description: Initial specimen text. When `editable`, typing replaces it in place.

props.name: editable
props.description: Render the specimen as a `plaintext-only` contentEditable line.

props.name: presets
props.description: Preset chips. Defaults to four Fraunces presets when `axes` is default, else none.

props.name: showSize
props.description: Show the font-size slider.

props.name: showTracking
props.description: Show the tracking (letter-spacing) slider.

props.name: defaultSize
props.description: Initial specimen size in px (clamped to the viewport at render).

props.name: sizeRange
props.description: [min, max] px for the size slider.

props.name: defaultTracking
props.description: Initial tracking in hundredths of an em (−1 → −0.010em).

props.name: trackingRange
props.description: [min, max] for the tracking slider, in hundredths of an em.

props.name: breathe
props.description: Idle "auto specimen": until any control is touched, the first two wide axes breathe through a slow sine loop (paused off-screen, stopped forever on first interaction, never started under prefers-reduced-motion).

props.name: onChange
props.description: Fires with the full axis map (tag → value) on every user-driven change.

props.name: accentColor
props.description: Accent for slider thumbs, active presets, focus rings, axis tags.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Specimen text colour. Defaults to the `--foreground` token.

props.name: specimenLabel
props.description: aria-label for the editable specimen line.

props.name: nodes
props.description: Graph nodes. Prefer a stable (memoised) array.

props.name: links
props.description: Graph links, referencing node ids. Unknown ids are ignored.

props.name: groupColors
props.description: Explicit colour per group key, e.g. `{ core: "#8b5cf6" }`. Accepts any CSS colour or a `var(--token, fallback)` expression.

props.name: groupPalette
props.description: Fallback palette cycled through groups (in first-appearance order) that have no `groupColors` entry.

props.name: nodeColor
props.description: Colour for ungrouped nodes. Defaults to the theme `--primary` token.

props.name: linkColor
props.description: Edge colour. Defaults to the theme `--muted-foreground` token.

props.name: labelColor
props.description: Label colour. Defaults to the theme `--muted-foreground` token.

props.name: pulse
props.description: Show a pulsing ring on `emphasis` nodes (static ring under reduced motion).

props.name: nodeRadius
props.description: Base node radius in px (grows slightly with degree and emphasis).

props.name: linkDistance
props.description: Link rest length in px. Defaults to ~22% of the shorter canvas edge.

props.name: height
props.description: Canvas height. Width always fills the container.

props.name: seed
props.description: Layout seed — change it to get a different deterministic arrangement.

props.name: canvasClassName
props.description: Class applied to the canvas element itself.
